privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating two calendar events in Odoo scheduling system: (1) 'Sprint Review' on Wednesday of next week from 14:00-15:00 at Engineering Lab with attendees David Chen, Emma Thompson, Luis Fernandez; (2) 'Executive Briefing' same day from 15:00-15:45 at Board Room with attendees Grace Patel, Henry Kim, Bob Williams. Both meetings must be back-to-back with Executive Briefing starting exactly when Sprint Review ends. The agent logs in with username 'admin' and password 'admin'.
